name: ORDERS_DLQ
description: Dead-letter for failed order-requests (orders.dlq.<bot_id>, T-216a OQ-3/OQ-8 application-level handler-explicit DLQ; NOT a max_deliver consumer — H-003 forbids order auto-retry). Forensic max_age 365d like AUDIT/TRADING_EVENTS — operator inspects failed orders. duplicate_window 0 (ORDERS' 30s is H-003-market-order-retry-specific, irrelevant for one-shot DLQ). Provisioned T-553 — T-216a shipped the subject+publish without the stream. Brief §8.1, §8.2.
